title: Happy birthday, Oblivion! Twenty years of beautiful vistas and unnerving potato faces
author: Grant St. Clair
summary: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion came out twenty years ago today, and there's a good chance you played it on your Xbox 360, enthralled by the beautiful vistas and unnerving potato faces. The open-world RPG was still a fairly new concept in 2006, at least for mainstream audiences, and a game in that genre getting triple-A budget and marketing was all but unheard
